parameters.query: SELECT id, opportunity_title, agency, contract_value, naics_code, set_aside, win_themes AS win_factors, key_differentiators, loss_reason, incumbent_displaced, incumbent_name, award_date, notes, created_at FROM gda_win_loss_db WHERE outcome = 'Won' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a defense BD win strategist. Analyze these win patterns for Envision Innovative Solutions and produce: (1) Top 3 win themes as concise phrases, (2) Recommended pwin weight adjustments (which Shipley factors to increase/decrease), (3) Best teaming partners to pursue, (4) Agencies to prioritize. Be terse. Data: ' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}
parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1500, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a defense BD win strategist for Envision Innovative Solutions (EIS), focused on Army C5ISR, IEW&S, and intel community IT. Analyze these win patterns and respond tersely with: (1) Top 3 win themes as concise phrases, (2) Which Shipley pwin factors to weight higher/lower, (3) Best teaming partners to pursue, (4) Top agencies to prioritize. Data: ' + JSON.stringify($json) }] }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO gda_learned_weights (factor_name, weight_adjustment, source, rationale, created_at) SELECT unnest(ARRAY['incumbent_displacement','agency_relationship','teaming_strength','naics_alignment','past_performance']), unnest(ARRAY[0.9, 1.1, 1.15, 1.05, 1.1]), 'AN-1-auto', 'Auto-seeded from win/loss analysis', NOW() ON CONFLICT (factor_name) DO UPDATE SET weight_adjustment = EXCLUDED.weight_adjustment, rationale = EXCLUDED.rationale

parameters.text:
={{ '🏆 *AN-1 WIN THEME ANALYSIS*
' + new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] + '

Total wins analyzed: ' + $('Extract Patterns').first().json.total_wins + '
Incumbent displacement rate: ' + $('Extract Patterns').first().json.displacement_rate + '%

Top agencies: ' + ($('Extract Patterns').first().json.top_agencies||[]).map(a=>a.agency+'('+a.wins+')').join(', ') + '

Claude analysis: ' + (($('Claude Win Theme Analysis').first().json.content && $('Claude Win Theme Analysis').first().json.content[0]) ? $('Claude Win Theme Analysis').first().json.content[0].text.substring(0,800) : 'No Claude analysis') }}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { status: 'skipped', message: 'No WON entries in gda_win_loss_db yet.' } }];
